appendix.title: Global Configuration Files
appendix.para: This section describe each of the global configuration parameter used in SilkPage. This information is most useful when configuring SilkPage's global settings after installation.

section.para: This is a catalog of public resources such as DTDs or entities that are referenced in an XML document. It's typically used to make web references to resources point to a locally cached copy of the resource. SilkPage uses this catalog to perform Entity and URI resolution. Please refer to the for more information about the usage and syntax of catalog.xml.

SilkPage uses Tidy to validate and cleanup the XHTML output. tidy.properties is located in the directory and it is the Tidy confiuration file to control its parameters. To find out about the Tidy parameters and options that can be defined in tidy.properties, please refer to Website.
